args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' ORDER BY caseid__c, createddate;

[SQL: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS num_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;]

args.query: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS num_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS num_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS num_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamptz - c.createddate::timestamptz))) AS avg_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::timestamptz BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::date AND '2023-09-02'::date GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS num_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamptz - c.createddate::timestamptz))) AS avg_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::timestamptz BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::date AND '2023-09-02'::date GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::date BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::date AND '2023-09-02'::date;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::date BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::date AND '2023-09-02'::date;

args.query: SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::date BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::date AND '2023-09-02'::date ORDER BY c.ownerid, c.createddate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate FROM "Case" c JOIN (SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS assign_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c) ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.assign_count = 1 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::date BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::date AND '2023-09-02'::date ORDER BY c.ownerid, c.createddate;

args.query: SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS total_cases FROM casehistory__c ch JOIN "Case" c ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::date BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c ORDER BY total_cases DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS total_cases FROM casehistory__c ch JOIN "Case" c ON ch.caseid__c = c.id WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL AND c.closeddate::date BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c ORDER BY total_cases DESC;
